title: Evangelion infos on mysteries English subtitled
display_title: Evangelion infos on mysteries English subtitled
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion infos on mysteries English subtitled             Quote Post by airman4 » Sat Apr 04, 2015 10:02 am https://www.youtube.com/watch?feature=player_embedded&v=PtdHyPMLYKY Hey Sorry if it have been posted already , just delete it i thought it could be cool for people here I already posted it here i think but at the time it wasnt subbed It's now , so i think it can be a great deal for people who watched the series and have hard times with the mysteries !! thanks

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Apr 04, 2015 10:37 am This was always a fun and well-produced video and it's nice to see it subbed. I definitely don't agree with much of the content... Can't disagree with a disclaimer like that, though!

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sat Apr 04, 2015 10:59 am You disagree ? I'm surprised This video is from nico nico videos So i guess it's Japanese fans who did this after officials infos on the EVA universe Khara should do this for rebuild series also

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Apr 04, 2015 12:53 pm Reichu wrote: This was always a fun and well-produced video and it's nice to see it subbed.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Apr 05, 2015 5:44 am First time seeing this. Nice, thanks for posting it.

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Apr 05, 2015 6:24 am Dima wrote: First time seeing this. Nice, thanks for posting it.

[]:             Quote Post by Dima » Sun Apr 05, 2015 7:09 am airman4 wrote: Did it helped you to understand better the fondamentals of NGE ? (summer time , place of angels , black and white moon etc )

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 05, 2015 8:15 am airman4 wrote: You disagree ? I'm surprised

[]:             Quote Post by airman4 » Sun Apr 05, 2015 8:48 am Reichu wrote: Why are you surprised? The creator doesn't even make pretexts to being correct, so presenting the video as the end-all be-all that will solve all people's questions is going a bit far. - Depiction of the Angels' genesis is... iffy. Here they're shown being created in their final form and scattered around the world before Lilith's arrival. In the show, it's strongly implied that Angels are not created in the forms we know, but as humanoids (cf. Sandalphon). It is also unknown whether their bodies were created before or at the time of 2I, or if their bodies may have existed in the White Moon and been scattered by 2I. Mention of Adam's Doors of Guf opening on 2I appears to be the reason why the Angels appear fifteen years later, though -- hinting that, whatever their physical form beforehand, they did not have souls for some reason. Needless to say, the origin of the Angels is an irresolvable clusterfuck. - First Impact wrongly shown here as a planetoid bouncing intact off Earth and pooping out the Black Moon. In actuality, the planetoid violently collided into Earth, with a great deal of the rocky shell careening into orbit and eventually coalescing to form the Moon. - Spear of Longinus wrongly depicted as the only component of the contact experiment. No mention made of the donor. There's not even any evidence that the Spear played a role in the CE itself, only that it was used in an attempt to subdue Adam as a result of the CE's effect on her.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Apr 05, 2015 12:31 pm Reichu wrote: - First Impact wrongly shown here as a planetoid bouncing intact off Earth and pooping out the Black Moon. In actuality, the planetoid violently collided into Earth, with a great deal of the rocky shell careening into orbit and eventually coalescing to form the Moon.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Apr 05, 2015 12:47 pm Mr. Tines wrote: So was it Adam or Lilith whose arrival was the Theia event?
